    a
  end

        has_ge_2 = true

      end

    else
      if maxC >= 1
        max_len = [max_len, right - left + 1].max
      end
    end

    while left <= right
      has_ge_2 = false
      for i in left..right
        if nums[i] >= 2
          has_ge_2 = true
          break
        end
      end

        break
      else
        if maxC >= 1
          max_len = [max_len, right - left + 1].max
          break
        else

          break
        end

    end
  end

  if max_len == 0
    return 0
  end

  return max_len - maxC
end
